example_queries: SELECT fund_cd, fund_fnm FROM FDTFN001 WHERE fund_fnm LIKE '%TDF%' AND haeji_gb='1' LIMIT 10
SELECT fund_cd, fund_fnm, bm_nm FROM FDTFN001 WHERE unyong_cd='088' LIMIT 10
SELECT gijun_ymd, fund_cd, seolj_aek, gijun_ga, nav FROM FDTFN201 WHERE fund_cd='K55105CJ7982' ORDER BY gijun_ymd DESC LIMIT 10
SELECT MAX(gijun_ymd) as latest_date FROM FDTFN201
SELECT tr_ymd, ticker, item_ticker, op_unit FROM BB_TDF0JG ORDER BY tr_ymd DESC LIMIT 10

common_queries.name: TDF 펀드 목록 (운용중)
common_queries.sql: SELECT fund_cd, fund_fnm FROM FDTFN001 WHERE fund_fnm LIKE '%TDF%' AND haeji_gb='1' ORDER BY fund_fnm

common_queries.name: 특정 펀드 최근 데이터
common_queries.sql: SELECT f.fund_fnm, d.gijun_ymd, d.seolj_aek, d.gijun_ga, d.nav FROM FDTFN001 f JOIN FDTFN201 d ON f.fund_cd=d.fund_cd WHERE f.fund_cd='{fund_cd}' ORDER BY d.gijun_ymd DESC LIMIT 30

common_queries.name: 한국투자 TDF 디폴트옵션
common_queries.sql: SELECT f.fund_cd, f.fund_fnm, d.seolj_aek, d.nav FROM FDTFN001 f JOIN FDTFN201 d ON f.fund_cd=d.fund_cd WHERE f.fund_fnm LIKE '%한국투자%' AND f.fund_fnm LIKE '%TDF%' AND f.haeji_gb='1' AND d.gijun_ymd=(SELECT MAX(gijun_ymd) FROM FDTFN201)

common_queries.name: 최신 기준일 확인
common_queries.sql: SELECT MAX(gijun_ymd) as latest_date FROM FDTFN201
